failures.description: The agent failed by planning to include unavailable products when the user specifically asked for the cheapest available Electric Kettle.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to find the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The agent understood the product type and intended to answer from catalog evidence, but at index 1 it planned a ProductCatalogSearch with "available_only": false even though the availability constraint was explicit in the user request and sufficient information was already available. This deviated from the required/policy-correct action of filtering to available products. The later answer happened to select an available item, but the initial plan/tool-call constraint remained wrong.
